calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Nov-14-2016 Off Calendar

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 18, 2016 in Department 525:
Ilia Brouk, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witness Elema Yudina.
Brandon T. Tang, Esq.,(415-931-4207) Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Laus Investment Group - owner Sophia Lau who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witness are sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Ilia Brouk testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - lease and November 11, 2015 e-mail from Ilia Brouk to Sophia & Jeffrey Lau.

Witness Elema Yudina testifies on behalf of Ilia Brouk and responds to the questions from the Court.

Counsel Tang testifies on behalf of Appellant Laus Investment Group and Ms. Lau responds to the questions from the Court.
Trial Brief submitted by Appellant's counsel in the open Court.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - 1/17/2015 San Francisco Fire Investigation Report

Closing argument presented by Mr. Brouk.
Closing argument presented by Mr. Tang and Ms. Lau.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Diana Kruze; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Continued To Jun-15-16 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
